name: voice-audio
description: MEOK AI Labs — Voice & Audio. Transcription, analysis, language detection, and duration estimation.

tools.name: transcribe_audio
tools.description: Transcribe audio to text using Whisper STT. Supports local files and multiple languages.

tools.name: analyze_audio
tools.description: Analyze audio or text for speech characteristics: word count, speaking rate, silence ratio, and complexity.

tools.name: detect_language
tools.description: Detect the language of text using statistical analysis of word patterns and n-grams.

tools.name: estimate_duration
tools.description: Estimate audio duration for text or word count at a given speaking rate, accounting for natural pauses.
